hero.title: THE BOARDROOM
hero.subtitle: Where decisions shape the future. Fortified meeting spaces engineered for absolute discretion.

intro.title: The Chamber of Influence
intro.description: Designed for the world's most sensitive dialogues. Our boardrooms are acoustically isolated fortresses equipped with state-of-the-art technology and serviced by a dedicated executive concierge.

spaces.name: The Silent Boardroom
spaces.description: Perfect for executive meetings and strategic discussions. Acoustically isolated with negative pressure for absolute privacy.
spaces.longDescription: The Silent Boardroom is engineered for confidentiality. With STC 65 acoustic rating and negative air pressure, conversations remain completely private. The room features a 4K video conferencing system, encrypted communications, and a private anteroom for assistants.

spaces.name: The Monolith Chamber
spaces.description: Mid-sized boardroom with panoramic views. Features a private lounge and translation booth for international delegations.
spaces.longDescription: The Monolith Chamber balances productivity with comfort. The main boardroom seats 24 around a custom limestone table, while the adjacent lounge provides space for informal discussions. The integrated translation booth supports up to 6 languages for international meetings.

spaces.name: The Presidential Hall
spaces.description: The largest boardroom, suitable for shareholder meetings, press conferences, and corporate events. Includes a reception area and secure comms room.
spaces.longDescription: The Presidential Hall is designed for high-stakes events. The main space can be configured for board meetings, press conferences, or gala dinners. The dedicated communications room ensures secure connections, while the reception area provides space for guests and media.

spaces.name: The Director's Suite
spaces.description: Intimate setting for small executive teams. Perfect for strategy sessions and one-on-one meetings.

spaces.name: The Innovation Lab
spaces.description: Creative space with interactive displays and flexible furniture. Ideal for brainstorming and workshops.

spaces.name: The Secure Vault
spaces.description: Maximum security meeting room with no windows. Faraday cage construction for complete signal isolation.

tech.title: 10Gbps Dedicated
tech.description: Encrypted fiber connection with military-grade security

tech.title: Voice Reinforcement
tech.description: Ceiling array microphones with AI noise cancellation

tech.title: 4K Conferencing
tech.description: Broadcast-quality video systems with multi-camera switching

tech.title: Biometric Access
tech.description: Fingerprint and facial recognition for authorized personnel

tech.title: Translation Services
tech.description: Professional interpreters and translation booths available

tech.title: Secure Recording
tech.description: Encrypted meeting recording with chain of custody

tech.title: Satellite Uplink
tech.description: Backup communications independent of local infrastructure

services.title: Executive Catering
services.description: Michelin-starred dining experiences in your boardroom

services.title: Translation Services
services.description: Professional interpreters for up to 12 languages

services.title: IT Support
services.description: Dedicated technicians on standby during your meeting
